body:
## Summary

- **`apps/web/Dockerfile`**: switched runner stage to use `.next/standalone` output + `node server.js` as entrypoint. The `next.config.js` already had `output: 'standalone'` but the Dockerfile was copying `.next` directly — this caused `verify_railway_surfaces.py` to fail CI.
- **`tests/test_article_13_compliance.py`**: added `api/routers/founder_launch_status.py` to the allowlist. This file only reads `CALENDLY_WEBHOOK_SECRET` from env vars to surface status in the founder dashboard — it contains no webhook handler logic. The Article 13 pattern scanner was flagging `CALENDLY_WEBHOOK_SECRET` as a forbidden webhook implementation.

## Test plan

- [x] `python scripts/verify_railway_surfaces.py` → `RAILWAY_SURFACES_OK`
- [x] `python scripts/check_env_contract.py` → OK
- [x] `python scripts/check_alembic_single_head.py` → OK (single head 013)
- [x] `python scripts/verify_founder_operating_system.py` → `FOUNDER_OS_OK`
- [x] `python scripts/verify_service_readiness_matrix.py` → OK
- [x] `python scripts/smoke_inprocess.py` → `SMOKE_INPROCESS_OK`
- [x] `python scripts/run_evals.py` → `EVAL_OK`
- [x] `pytest tests/test_article_13_compliance.py` → 2 passed, 1 skipped
- [x] Doctrine guard + commercial chain tests → 153 passed, 1 skipped
- [x] Full quick regression bundle → 59 passed

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01WoVgpeNkoz8TmU4DSRdBvo)_

commits.messageBody:
- apps/web/Dockerfile: switch runner stage to .next/standalone + node server.js
  (required by next.config.js `output: 'standalone'` and verify_railway_surfaces.py)
- tests/test_article_13_compliance.py: allowlist founder_launch_status.py which
  only reads CALENDLY_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var for status reporting, not a webhook handler
commits.messageHeadline: fix: resolve CI failures — standalone Dockerfile + Article 13 allowlist

commits.messageBody:
… separators

- social_content_queue.yaml: bump cycle_weeks 20→28, approve week-4 post
- evidence_events_tracker.csv: add 2026-06-08 scope_requested event row
- soft_launch_meetings_tracker.yaml: update timestamp, fix Windows backslash paths → forward slashes
commits.messageHeadline: chore: auto-update ops data files — cycle weeks, evidence event, path…

title: fix: resolve CI failures — standalone Dockerfile + Article 13 allowlist
